AP_LOAD_RECOVERY.body:
You had a run in-progress before losing connection.

 Would you like to continue it? (If not, the local recovery file will be deleted, and you'll only have access to saves available on the server')
AP_LOST_CONNECTION.body:
Connection to the Archipelago Server has been lost. You will be returned to the Main Menu now.

 Would you like to make a recovery save file?
